goal: Find the installation command for the Button component

actions.title: The Foundation for your Design System - shadcn/ui
actions.description: Click the Components link to navigate to the components overview page
actions.reasoning: To find the installation command for the Button component, we need to locate the Button component documentation, which is listed under the Components section. Clicking the Components link will take us to the components directory where we can then select Button and view its installation instructions.
